channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Code Notes for C# Beta - Fri May 22 12:35:49 UTC 2026
item.description:
Code Notes Rider plugin that allows you to pin notes to C# code symbols directly inside the Rider IDE. 🆕 Pin to symbol is the most powerful feature introduced in...
vendor: BeanSoft downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: github.beansoft.plugins.codenotes.rd

item.title: Rubber Duck Debugger - Thu May 21 09:04:13 UTC 2026

item.title: Python Doc Links - Sat May 23 08:57:20 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: AI Chat File Links - Fri May 22 02:11:45 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: Stock Ticker - Thu May 21 02:10:16 UTC 2026
item.description:
Shows configurable stock quotes in the IntelliJ IDEA status bar. 在 IntelliJ IDEA 状态栏滚动展示股票代码、名称、最新价、涨跌金额和涨跌幅，并支持配置名称显示、涨跌颜色和滚动间隔。.
vendor: snfdf downloads: 8 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.stockticker.plugin
